_doc: EU AI Act Annex IV §1(c) — model lineage / supply-chain record.
served_via: in-process MLP head invoked by the eu-kiki gateway (FastAPI :9300)

source.provider: L'Électron Rare (head trained in-house) + Microsoft / Hugging Face (encoder)

weights_file.comment: Hash captured on next deploy. Reproducible from training data + scripts/train_router.py with fixed seed.

training_data.source: L'Électron Rare proprietary corpus — ~46 500 user-style prompts classified across 34 technical domains
datasets_combined: scripts/augment_router_data.py — manually curated 528 prompts targeting docker/spice/calcul-normatif gaps + FR/EN code-switching
training_data.language_mix: primarily fr/en (mixed), small amounts of de/it/es
training_data.copyright_status: All training prompts are short user-style queries written or paraphrased internally; no scraped third-party copyrighted text.

training_method.hardware: Mac Studio M3 Ultra (CPU encoder + CPU/Metal head)

modifications_post_download: Classifier head trained from scratch on internal corpus
intended_use: Domain routing only — classifies an inbound user prompt into one of 34 technical domains and forwards the chat request to the most adapted backend worker (Apertus / Devstral / EuroLLM / Qwen / Gemma).
out_of_scope: Standalone classification of safety-critical text (e.g. medical triage)
Anything requiring calibrated probabilities — head is not calibrated
